---
title: "Sumaiya Alvi"
image: media/memage.jpg
2toc: false
about: 
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 15em
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/sumaiyaxalvi/
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/sumaiyaalvi
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:sumaiyaxalvi@gmail.com
---

Hi there! My name is Sumaiya Alvi, welcome to my website! I'm currently a 4th year student at UC Santa Barbara studying Statistics and Data Science. In my 4 years taking classes at this university, my favorite topic that I've learned so far has to be data visualization. I love experimenting and learning more about all the fun customisations that can be made. Outside of class, you can catch my at MSA (Muslim Student Association) club meetings where I serve as Vice President, going for sunset walks in Isla Vista, or re-reading my favorite book, _Song of Achilles_. Feel free to explore all the different pages on this website to learn more about me!
